Start with the Deployment spec. Set strategy to RollingUpdate with maxUnavailable: 0 and maxSurge: 1 for zero-downtime deployments.
Add resource requests at 50% of limits for proper scheduling. Include both liveness probe (detects deadlocks) and readiness probe (controls traffic) with appropriate delays.
Create a ClusterIP Service with selector matching your Deployment labels. The port (80) maps to targetPort (container port). Use autoscaling/v2 for HPA with CPU-based scaling.
Add pod anti-affinity to spread replicas across nodes. Set security context with runAsNonRoot: true. Configure HPA scaleDown stabilization to prevent thrashing.
